decks.notes: The main focus of this deck is to quickly ramp up mana using cards like Llanowar Elves and Fabled Passage to play powerful creatures like Sazh's Chocobo and Ba Sing Se. Earthbender Ascension helps to further ramp up mana, while cards like Sapling Nursery and Mightform Harmonizer provide additional value. Escape Tunnel and Royal Treatment offer protection for key creatures, while cards like Icetill Explorer and Badgermole Cub provide aggression. Utilizing a combination of fast mana ramp and efficient creatures, this Mono Green Aggro deck aims to overwhelm opponents quickly and efficiently.

The main focus of this deck is to maintain board control through a combination of creature removal and card advantage. By utilizing cards like Maelstrom Pulse, Ral Zarek, Guest Lecturer, and Requiting Hex, the deck aims to eliminate threats while also generating value from its own creatures. The inclusion of cards like Badgermole Cub and Emeritus of Abundance provide early game stabilization, while the mana base is designed to support a steady stream of threats and answers. Overall, the deck seeks to outvalue and outlast opponents through a combination of removal and card advantage.

The deck focuses on using Omniscience to play multiple powerful creatures for free, while also utilizing cards like Multiversal Passage and Kavaron, Memorial World to ramp up mana quickly. The inclusion of Formidable Speaker and Stock Up helps to draw through the deck efficiently, while cards like Ashling, Rekindled and Uthros, Titanic Godcore provide strong control and removal options. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of powerful creatures and efficient spells, aiming to win the game through a devastating combo of creatures and spells.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly generate mana and play aggressive creatures with haste to overwhelm the opponent. By utilizing cards like Ashling, Rekindled and Burst Lightning, the deck aims to deal fast damage and control the board with cards like Roaming Throne and Flamebraider. The inclusion of cards like Wistfulness and Deceit adds versatility and disruption to the deck's strategy, allowing the player to outmaneuver the opponent and ensure victory through a combination of tempo and direct damage.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize the aggressive nature of Azorius creatures and spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent and establish board dominance. By using cards like Momo, Friendly Flier, Starfield Shepherd, and Sage of the Skies, the deck aims to put pressure on the opponent early on and maintain it throughout the game. Additionally, cards like Quantum Riddler and Multiversal Passage help to control the battlefield and provide additional advantages. The inclusion of cards like Erode and Seam Rip also helps to disrupt the opponent's game plan and give this deck an edge in combat.

This UR Aggro deck focuses on quickly overwhelming opponents with low-cost spells and creatures. The deck utilizes cards like Burst Lightning and Stormchaser's Talent to deal damage efficiently, while also employing tempo plays such as Boomerang Basics and Opt to control the board. Riverpyre Verge and Slickshot Show-Off provide additional threats, while Spell Pierce and Multiversal Passage offer disruption and flexibility. The deck aims to maintain pressure and tempo throughout the game, using a combination of burn spells and evasive creatures to secure a swift victory.

The main concept of this deck is to use a combination of creatures like Ashling, Rekindled, Kavaron, and Uthros along with spells like Omniscience and Stock Up to create a powerful synergy that allows you to overwhelm your opponent with powerful spells and creatures. By utilizing the abilities of your creatures and the card advantage from Omniscience, you can quickly establish control of the game and secure victory. Additionally, cards like Winternight Stories and Marang River Regent provide additional utility and control options to further enhance your game plan.

The deck focuses on utilizing various cards that allow the player to bring powerful creatures back from the graveyard, combining them with strategic spells to create a formidable board presence. By using cards like Strategic Betrayal and Stock Up to manipulate the graveyard and disrupt the opponent's strategy, as well as cards like Requiting Hex and Doomsday Excruciator to bring back key creatures, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with strong reanimated creatures and powerful combo plays.

This Dimir Aggro deck focuses on utilizing a combination of aggressive creatures and disruptive spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent. With a mix of evasive creatures like Spyglass Siren and powerful finishers like Kaito, Bane of Nightmares, the deck aims to apply pressure early and maintain control of the board. Enduring Curiosity provides card advantage, while Shoot the Sheriff, Requiting Hex, and other removal spells help clear the way for attacks. With a focus on tempo and aggression, this deck seeks to close out games before the opponent can establish their own game plan.

The deck focuses on dealing damage quickly and efficiently using a combination of cheap spells and evasive creatures. By utilizing cards like Burst Lightning, Opt, and Flow State to control the board and deal direct damage, alongside creatures like Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off to chip in for damage, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent before they can establish their own game plan. The inclusion of multicolor lands and spells allows for flexibility in casting powerful spells like Octopus Form and Prismari Charm.

The deck focuses on aggressively attacking the opponent with a combination of low-cost creatures and burn spells. It aims to quickly reduce the opponent's life total while maintaining tempo with efficient threats and removal. The inclusion of cards like Riverpyre Verge and Soulstone Sanctuary provide additional reach and resilience, allowing the deck to close out games even in the face of opposing threats. The overall strategy is to maintain pressure and momentum throughout the game, leveraging the deck's versatility and flexibility to outpace and overwhelm the opponent.

The Golgari Control deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan by using a combination of removal spells, hand disruption, and efficient creatures. The deck utilizes cards like Duress and Requiting Hex to strip cards from the opponent's hand, while cards like Tragedy Feaster and Maelstrom Pulse provide removal for threats on the board. The deck also generates card advantage with cards like Keen-Eyed Curator and Emeritus of Abundance, allowing the player to maintain control of the game. Additionally, the deck has a strong mana base to ensure consistent access to its powerful spells.

The Golgari Control deck focuses on utilizing a mixture of removal spells, hand disruption, and efficient creatures to establish control over the game. By combining powerful cards like Maelstrom Pulse, Duress, and Wastewood Verge with key creatures like Emeritus of Abundance and Tragedy Feaster, the deck aims to out-value and outlast opponents. The deck also benefits from a strong mana base featuring Overgrown Tomb and Llanowar Elves to ensure consistent and powerful plays. Overall, the Golgari Control deck seeks to dominate the battlefield through a combination of resource denial and efficient threats.

This deck focuses on quickly filling up the graveyard with high-value creatures and then using reanimation spells to bring them back into play for a powerful combo finish. Cards like Doomsday Excruciator and Requiting Hex benefit from having creatures in the graveyard, while Superior Spider-Man and Emeritus of Ideation provide strong reanimation targets. The deck also includes disruption cards like Duress and Deadly Cover-Up to protect the combo. The strategy revolves around efficiently managing resources and timing the reanimation spells for maximum impact.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and direct damage spells. By playing efficient threats like Colorstorm Stallion, Emberheart Challenger, and Nova Hellkite alongside burn spells like Burst Lightning and Channeled Dragonfire, the deck aims to apply pressure and finish off the opponent as quickly as possible. The inclusion of cards like Soulstone Sanctuary and Riverpyre Verge help to stabilize the board and provide additional value. With a mix of creatures and burn spells, this UR Aggro deck aims to close out games swiftly and decisively.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with fast and efficient creatures in order to deal damage quickly. By utilizing cards that accelerate mana production like Llanowar Elves and Fabled Passage, as well as efficient combat tricks like Earthbender Ascension and Meltstrider's Resolve, the deck aims to maintain board presence and apply pressure to the opponent. The creatures in the deck are resilient and can be difficult to deal with, making it difficult for the opponent to stabilize and turn the tide of the game in their favor.
